import numpy as np
montos = np.array([5, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 40], dtype=float)

Cierre: print("Q1", float(q1), "| Q3", float(q3), "| IQR", float(q3 - q1))

exercises.code:
import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = z.copy()
y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1)
by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1])
ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
print("r_raw", r_raw, "| max_abs_resid", float(max(np.max(np.abs(rx)), np.max(np.abs(ry)))))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S18-T3-A-E3 (transfer): resolví el fixture del paquete para «correlación residual tras confusor» respetando el pass «r_raw 1.0 | max_abs_resid 0.0». Usé theory/iDo (S18-T1-A-DEMO) y pistas ['Residualiza x e y respecto a z.', 'corrcoef de residuales ≈ 0 o nan controlado.'] del slim packet, sin solutions externas. Cierre: print("r_raw", r_raw, "| max_abs_resid", float(max(np.max(np.abs(rx)), np.max(np.abs(ry)))))

m = np.array([10, 12, 11, 13, 50], dtype=float)

import numpy as np
m = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 100], dtype=float)
q1, q3 = np.quantile(m, [0.25, 0.75])
iqr = q3 - q1
lo, hi = q1 - 1.5 * iqr, q3 + 1.5 * iqr
print(((m < lo) | (m > hi)).tolist())

def traza(pregunta, metrica, valor, limite):
    print("P:", pregunta)
    print("M:", metrica)
    print("V:", valor)
    print("L:", limite)
traza("ticket mediano Lima", "median", 27.5, "solo web")
